title: cryptorrhynchus kelleri
intro:
Cryptorrhynchus kelleri, also known as the Kellers weevil or Kellers beetle, is not a plant, but rather a type of weevil beetle that belongs to the family Curculionidae. However, the plant that this beetle is associated with is likely a type of plant that the beetle is known to infest. 

Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information about a specific plant by the name of Cryptorrhynchus kelleri.
